body:
## Purpose 
Towards improving test coverage in SurfaceFluxes.jl - this PR adds consistency checks for sign conventions in momentum and buoyancy fluxes, evaporation, and L_MO. 
#73 

## Content
- [x] Tests for dry atmospheres (consistency in stability regimes and output fluxes)
- [x] Tests for moist atmospheres (consistency in stability regimes and output fluxes)

----
- [x] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: Add consistency checks for output flux and b.l. stability conventions
